title: SOL 15pk Steel Wool Scourer Pads, Heavy Duty Soap Filled Scouring Pads for Pots, Pans, and Cookers, Durable, Rust-Resistant, Built-In Soap for Cutting Grease & Stains, Multi-Purpose Use for Cleaning
features: Clean with Ease - Effortlessly remove stubborn stains and grime from surfaces with our soap filled scouring pads, making cleaning tasks quicker and more efficient. With powerful cleaning action, that can tackle tough messes with minimal effort.

Multi-Purpose - Our soap pads offer versatility beyond just cleaning they can be used for various tasks around the house. From scrubbing pot and pan to cleaning countertops and appliances, these pads are your go-to for a wide range of cleaning needs.

Superior Scrubbing - Experience unparalleled cleaning power with our soap pads' scrubbing action. Designed with high-quality materials, including steel wool, these cleaning pad lift and remove tough stains, grease, and grime from surfaces with ease.

Non-Scratch Design - Our soap-filled pads not only clean effectively but also protect your surfaces from scratches and damage. Engineered with a unique blend of materials, these pads deliver a gentle yet powerful cleaning action.

Convenient Pack - Streamline your cleaning routine with our soap-filled scourer pads, ensuring you have a reliable supply ready for whenever messes arise. With a 15-pack, you'll always have an adequate supply for all your cleaning needs.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Easy as 1-2-3 2 For Every Household Effortless Scrubbing, Essential Kitchen Scourers for Every Need! 15pk Soap Filled Pads Add To Basket 8pk Steel Scourer Buying Options Sponge and Steel Scourer Buying Options 16pk Steel Scourer Buying Options 20pk Small Sponge Add To Basket Heavy Duty Sponge Scourer Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 199 3.6 out of 5 stars 494 3.4 out of 5 stars 36 3.3 out of 5 stars 31 4.2 out of 5 stars 37 4.4 out of 5 stars 237 Price £5.99 £ 5 . 99 — — — £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 Re-usable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Multi-use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Efficient Cleaning ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Value Pack ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What makes these soap-filled pads effective for cleaning? The soap-filled pads combine high-quality steel wool with a powerful soap solution to cut through tough stains and grease, ensuring effective and efficient cleaning. Can these pads be used on all surfaces? Yes, these pads are versatile for various surfaces, including pots, pans, countertops, and appliances, thanks to their non-scratch design that prevents damage. How do the soap-filled pads handle tough stains and grime? Designed for superior scrubbing, these pads lift and remove stubborn stains and grime effortlessly, making cleaning tasks quicker and reducing the effort needed. How many pads are included in the pack? The pack contains 15 soap-filled pads, ensuring a reliable supply for all your cleaning needs, whether for home or kitchen use. Are these cleaning pads suitable for heavy-duty use? Yes, the pads are made from durable materials and are designed for heavy-duty use, effectively cutting through grease and grime while maintaining their integrity.
